2399550.name: The Idiot's Tale Soundtrack
2399550.description: This is the soundtrack for The Idiot's Tale, Megalithic Mainframe's hottest point-and-click adventure game! In The Idiot's Tale, you take control of Sir Jimothy Quest, noble knight-errant tasked with recovering the kingdom's three lost treasures. Along the way, he'll encounter fearsome monsters, classic fairy tale characters, corporate fast food, and more puzzles than you can shake your cursor at.
